input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.2.2
            TITLE: submission penalties

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.2.2: Submission Penalties
EV.2.2 Submission Penalties  
Penalties for the ESF are imposed as given in section DR - Document Requirements.

final_answer: rule EV.2.2: Submission Penalties EV.2.2 Submission Penalties Penalties for the ESF are imposed as given in section DR - Document Requirements.
